properties.sql:
select
    '../docs/tiktok' as tiktok_root,
    '../docs/tiktok/.env.tiktok' as env_file,
    '.stitchly/secrets/tiktok' as out_dir,
    '.stitchly/secrets/tiktok/tiktok_tokens.json' as token_file,
    'artifacts/tiktok/auth_probe/data.parquet' as artifact_path;

properties.code:
set -eu

workspace="${DUCKLE_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}"
duckdb_bin="${DUCKLE_DUCKDB_BIN:-duckdb}"

csv_value() {
  tail -n +2 | tr -d '\r' | sed 's/^"//; s/"$//'
}

input_value() {
  col="$1"
  "$duckdb_bin" -csv "$DUCKLE_DUCKDB_DATABASE" -c "select coalesce(cast(\"${col}\" as varchar), '') from \"$DUCKLE_INPUT_TABLE\" limit 1" | csv_value
}

cd "$workspace"

tiktok_root="$(input_value tiktok_root)"
env_file="$(input_value env_file)"
token_file="$(input_value token_file)"
out_dir="$(input_value out_dir)"

if [ -z "$tiktok_root" ]; then
  echo "run_auth_probe: tiktok_root is required" >&2
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p "$out_dir"

export TIKTOK_ENV_FILE="$env_file"
export TIKTOK_OUT_DIR="$out_dir"
export TIKTOK_TOKEN_FILE="$token_file"

wrapper_stdout="$out_dir/auth_probe.wrapper.stdout.txt"
wrapper_stderr="$out_dir/auth_probe.wrapper.stderr.txt"
report_path="$out_dir/auth_probe_report.json"
probe_script_exit_code=0

if bash "$tiktok_root/tiktok_auth_probe.sh" > "$wrapper_stdout" 2> "$wrapper_stderr"; then
  probe_script_exit_code=0
else
  probe_script_exit_code=$?
fi

if [ -s "$report_path" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq \
    --argjson probe_script_exit_code "$probe_script_exit_code" \
    --arg wrapper_stdout_file "$wrapper_stdout" \
    --arg wrapper_stderr_file "$wrapper_stderr" \
    '. + {
      probe_script_exit_code: $probe_script_exit_code,
      wrapper_stdout_file: $wrapper_stdout_file,
      wrapper_stderr_file: $wrapper_stderr_file
    }' \
    "$report_path"
else
  printf '{"ok":false,"probe_script_exit_code":%s,"token_file":"%s","error":"probe did not produce report","wrapper_stdout_file":"%s","wrapper_stderr_file":"%s"}\n' \
    "$probe_script_exit_code" \
    "$token_file" \
    "$wrapper_stdout" \
    "$wrapper_stderr"
fi

exit 0

properties.sql:
, raw as (
    select
      trim(coalesce(stdout, '')) as stdout_json,
      coalesce(stderr, '') as shell_stderr,
      try_cast(exit_code as integer) as shell_exit_code,
      try_cast(duration_ms as bigint) as shell_duration_ms
    from input
  ),
  parsed as (
    select
      *,
      try_cast(nullif(stdout_json, '') as json) as payload
    from raw
  )
  select
    current_timestamp as checked_at,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.ok') as boolean), false) as auth_probe_ok,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.probe_script_exit_code') as integer), -1) as probe_script_exit_code,
    shell_exit_code,
    shell_duration_ms,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.token_file') as token_file,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.access_token_seconds_remaining') as bigint) as access_token_seconds_remaining,
    try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.refresh_token_seconds_remaining') as bigint) as refresh_token_seconds_remaining,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.has_access_token') as boolean), false) as has_access_token,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.auth_status.has_refresh_token') as boolean), false) as has_refresh_token,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.user_info_summary.ok') as boolean), false) as user_info_ok,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.user_info_summary.open_id_present') as boolean), false) as open_id_present,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.video_list_summary.ok') as boolean), false) as video_list_ok,
    coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.video_list_summary.video_count') as bigint), 0) as video_count,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.video_list_summary.error.code') as video_error_code,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.video_list_summary.error.message') as video_error_message,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.artifacts.auth_status') as auth_status_artifact,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.artifacts.user_info') as user_info_artifact,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.artifacts.video_list') as video_list_artifact,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.wrapper_stdout_file') as wrapper_stdout_file,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.wrapper_stderr_file') as wrapper_stderr_file,
    payload is not null as parsed_ok,
    case
      when payload is null then 'parse_failed'
      when coalesce(try_cast(json_extract_string(payload, '$.ok') as boolean), false) then 'ok'
      else 'auth_probe_failed'
    end as auth_probe_status,
    stdout_json as raw_stdout,
    shell_stderr as raw_stderr
  from parsed

properties.code:
set -eu

duckdb_bin="${DUCKLE_DUCKDB_BIN:-duckdb}"

csv_value() {
  tail -n +2 | tr -d '\r' | sed 's/^"//; s/"$//'
}

input_value() {
  col="$1"
  "$duckdb_bin" -csv "$DUCKLE_DUCKDB_DATABASE" -c "select coalesce(cast(\"${col}\" as varchar), '') from \"$DUCKLE_INPUT_TABLE\" limit 1" | csv_value
}

auth_probe_status="$(input_value auth_probe_status)"
auth_probe_ok="$(input_value auth_probe_ok)"
user_info_ok="$(input_value user_info_ok)"
video_list_ok="$(input_value video_list_ok)"
video_count="$(input_value video_count)"
access_remaining="$(input_value access_token_seconds_remaining)"
refresh_remaining="$(input_value refresh_token_seconds_remaining)"
video_error_code="$(input_value video_error_code)"
video_error_message="$(input_value video_error_message)"

if [ "$auth_probe_ok" = "true" ]; then
  printf 'TikTok auth probe OK: user_info=%s video_list=%s videos=%s access_token_seconds_remaining=%s refresh_token_seconds_remaining=%s\n' \
    "$user_info_ok" \
    "$video_list_ok" \
    "${video_count:-0}" \
    "${access_remaining:-unknown}" \
    "${refresh_remaining:-unknown}"
else
  printf 'TikTok auth probe FAILED: status=%s user_info=%s video_list=%s videos=%s access_token_seconds_remaining=%s refresh_token_seconds_remaining=%s' \
    "${auth_probe_status:-unknown}" \
    "$user_info_ok" \
    "$video_list_ok" \
    "${video_count:-0}" \
    "${access_remaining:-unknown}" \
    "${refresh_remaining:-unknown}"
  if [ -n "$video_error_code" ] || [ -n "$video_error_message" ]; then
    printf ' video_error_code=%s video_error_message=%s' "$video_error_code" "$video_error_message"
  fi
  printf '\n'
fi

exit 0
